# Angelika Belle

Angelika Belle is a Nigerian singer, songwriter and performer from Port Harcourt, Rivers State, Nigeria. Her music blends Afro-Reggaeton, R&B, soul, reggae, Afrobeats and alternative sounds.

Official website: https://angelikabelle.com/

## Key facts

- Artist name: Angelika Belle
- Also described as: Rasta Maria
- Origin: Port Harcourt, Rivers State, Nigeria
- Based in: Lagos, Nigeria
- Occupation: Singer, songwriter and performer
- Education: Theatre Arts, University of Port Harcourt
- Early career: Lead singer of The Blue Pearls Band
- Career history: Discovered by the late Sound Sultan through a reggae cover of "Faya Faya"; released music during the Naija Ninjas era; now independent
- Genres: Afro-Reggaeton, R&B, soul, reggae, Afrobeats, alternative
- Notable songs: What You Like, Dreadlocks, Dreadlocks (Remix), Sho'Ma, My Love, Fall, Burn, Turn on Your Light, 1n Day
- Awards and press: Galaxy Music Awards Best Alternative Song for "Sho'Ma" in 2022; press coverage from Seychelles Nation, Vanguard NG, The Sun Nigeria, Guardian NG, THISDAY and Turntable Charts

## Important pages

- About: https://angelikabelle.com/about.html
- Music: https://angelikabelle.com/music.html
